name: SECC-OS — Inbox Promotion v1 (Validated → LIE DAR)

nodes.name: Promote Trigger
nodes.notes: On-demand DAR promotion. Run AFTER the DAR Generator's 6:07pm cron so the day's DAR row exists to enrich.

nodes.name: Query Inbox Rows
nodes.notes: Integration Inbox. Code filters Record Lifecycle=Validated + Entity Type in {property_unit, workorder}. Attach Notion credential in UI (Bug 26).

nodes.name: Query DAR Rows
nodes.notes: LIE DAR Data Engine. Used to match an existing DAR row by Property + DAR Date. Promotion ENRICHES (update-only) — it never creates a DAR (the DAR Generator owns creation). Attach Notion credential in UI.

nodes.name: Update DAR Row
nodes.notes: Enriches the existing DAR row with verified box-score numbers (Occupied %, Lease %, Pending Work Orders). Narrative fields (Traffic/Resident Notes) are never overwritten. Attach Notion credential in UI.

propertyValues.textContent: ={{ 'Promoted to DAR ' + $('Build DAR Updates').item.json.property + ' ' + $('Build DAR Updates').item.json.dar_date + ' @ ' + $('Build DAR Updates').item.json.promoted_at }}

nodes.name: Mark Inbox Promoted
nodes.notes: Flips the Inbox row to Promoted + stamps Promoted To = 'LIE DAR Data Engine'. Reads inbox_page_id from Build DAR Updates so the pairing survives the upstream Update node. Attach Notion credential in UI.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ promoted: $runIndex + 1, property: $('Build DAR Updates').item.json.property, dar_date: $('Build DAR Updates').item.json.dar_date, lifecycle: 'Promoted', promoted_to: 'DAR' }) }}
